name: ai-multimodal-assistant
description: AI Multimodal Assistant - clone and run

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../avatar-service && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:avatar"
